description: GFBI spacing, radius, shadow, and breakpoint tokens. Sharp corners (2px) carry the bold-modern signature. No soft shadows.

spacing._usage: Use 4px multiples (0.25rem). Compose layouts on a 4-point grid.

radius._usage: Sharp corners are the GFBI signature. 2px on buttons and cards. 0 on dividers, image frames, and chart axes. Never pill-shaped.

borderWidth._usage: 1px rules in slate-200. Never use 3px or odd values.

shadow._usage: Use shadows sparingly — only on raised cards and floating UI. Do not stack with borders.

breakpoint._usage: Mobile baseline is 390px (iPhone). Verify every layout there before declaring done.

tapTarget._usage: Apple HIG: 44pt minimum tap target. Never let interactive elements drop below 40px on mobile.

container._usage: prose width caps reading line length. Use for body copy in reports.

deck._usage: Slides are 1920x1080 by default. Padding kept generous so headlines breathe.
